text: AI is changing the workplace in significant ways. Automation of repetitive tasks, such as data entry and scheduling, allows employees to focus on more creative and strategic work. Productivity tools powered by AI can analyze large amounts of data quickly, helping teams make better decisions. However, rather than replacing humans entirely, the most effective approach often involves human-AI collaboration. For example, AI can suggest solutions, while humans evaluate and apply them based on context and experience. As a result, many jobs are evolving rather than disappearing, requiring workers to develop new skills like critical thinking and technical literacy alongside AI systems.
